allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 8 -UseBasicParsing; "Server up: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Not ready yet" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; "Server up: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Not ready: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($pkg = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\lucak\\luca-culinary-studio\\node_modules\\tailwindcss\\package.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "tailwindcss: $\($pkg.version\)"; $shadcn = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\lucak\\luca-culinary-studio\\node_modules\\shadcn\\package.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "shadcn: $\($shadcn.version\)")

PowerShell(curl.exe -s "http://localhost:3000/api/rezepte" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 3; Write-Output "---"; curl.exe -s "http://localhost:3000/api/zutaten" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 2; Write-Output "---"; curl.exe -s "http://localhost:3000/api/projekte" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 2)

PowerShell(curl.exe -s -m 15 -o NUL -w "%{http_code}" "http://localhost:3000/rezepte" 2>&1; Write-Output " /rezepte"; curl.exe -s -m 15 -o NUL -w "%{http_code}" "http://localhost:3000/zutaten" 2>&1; Write-Output " /zutaten"; curl.exe -s -m 15 -o NUL -w "%{http_code}" "http://localhost:3000/projekte" 2>&1; Write-Output " /projekte")

PowerShell(curl.exe -s -m 15 -o NUL -w "%{http_code}" "http://localhost:3000/" 2>&1; Write-Output " /"; curl.exe -s -m 15 -o NUL -w "%{http_code}" "http://localhost:3000/tellerdesigner" 2>&1; Write-Output " /tellerdesigner"; curl.exe -s -m 15 -o NUL -w "%{http_code}" "http://localhost:3000/wein-pairing" 2>&1; Write-Output " /wein-pairing"; curl.exe -s -m 15 -o NUL -w "%{http_code}" "http://localhost:3000/fermentation" 2>&1; Write-Output " /fermentation"; curl.exe -s -m 15 -o NUL -w "%{http_code}" "http://localhost:3000/ki-sous-chef" 2>&1; Write-Output " /ki-sous-chef")
